name: Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku (The Fragrant Flower Blooms with Dignity)
description:
I wondered why nobody has made a bot about this manga, only some people has made the characters.. so i decided to take matters to my hands. (this is my first bot, so please give your ratings and advices on how to make the bot better!





you know, i acc love this manga alot cuz its relatable. 😼 (its recommend for your persona to be male, so its CANON!!!11!11!)
By the way, you could write some reviews if theres any problems with the bot, i'll try my best to fix it.
creator: phill17
